content: I'll split this bead into focused child beads. Let me create them sequentially:

args.command:
br create "Analyze fetch implementation differences" "Read and compare src/fetch/commands.py+orchestrator.py vs src/fetch/strand.py+executor.py. Document any capabilities in strand.py that don't exist in the canonical stack (streaming callbacks, source types, coverage logic). Output a comparison report to notes/adc-wa9-comparison.md.

Acceptance criteria:
- Comparison report exists documenting all strand.py capabilities
- List of any features that need migration to canonical stack"

output:
Exit code 1
Error: error: unexpected argument 'Analyze fetch implementation differences' found

Usage: br create [OPTIONS] --title <TITLE>

For more information, try '--help'.

Exit code 1
Error: Create a new bead

Usage: br create [OPTIONS] --title <TITLE>

Options:
      --title <TITLE>              Bead title
      --type <TYPE>                Bead type [default: task]
      --priority <PRIORITY>        Priority (0=Critical, 4=Backlog) [default: 2]
      --description <DESCRIPTION>  Description
      --assignee <ASSIGNEE>        Assignee
      --label <LABEL>              Labels
  -w, --workspace <WORKSPACE>      Workspace directory (defaults to current directory's

args.command:
br create --title "Analyze fetch implementation differences" --description "Read and compare src/fetch/commands.py+orchestrator.py vs src/fetch/strand.py+executor.py. Document any capabilities in strand.py that don't exist in the canonical stack (streaming callbacks, source types, coverage logic). Output a comparison report to notes/adc-wa9-comparison.md.

Acceptance criteria:
- Comparison report exists documenting all strand.py capabilities
- List of any features that need migration to canonical stack" --label split-child

output: adc-1dvh

args.command:
br create --title "Port strand capabilities to canonical stack" --description "Based on comparison report from adc-1dvh, port any unique capabilities from strand.py (streaming callbacks, source types, coverage logic) into the canonical orchestrator+commands stack.

Acceptance criteria:
- All strand.py capabilities now exist in orchestrator+commands
- Existing tests still pass" --label split-child --depends-on adc-1dvh

output:
Exit code 1
Error: error: unexpected argument '--depends-on' found

Usage: br create --title <TITLE> --description <DESCRIPTION> --label <LABEL>

For more information, try '--help'.

  list           List beads
  show           Show bead details
  update         Update a bead
  close          Close a bead
  reopen         Reopen a bead
  delete         Delete a bead
  ready          Show ready (unblocked) beads
  claim          Claim a bead (atomic)
  init           Initialize a new workspace
  sync           Sync (flush to JSONL or import

Exit code 1
Error: Manage dependencies

Usage: br dep [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

Commands:
  add     Add a dependency
  remove  Remove a dependency
  list    List dependencies of an issue
  tree    Show dependency tree rooted at issue
  help    Print this message or the help of the given subcommand(s)

Options:
  -w, --workspace <WORKSPACE>  Workspace directory (defaults to current directory's .beads/)
  -h, --help                   Print help
  -V, --version                Print version

args.command:
br create --title "Port strand capabilities to canonical stack" --description "Based on comparison report from adc-1dvh, port any unique capabilities from strand.py (streaming callbacks, source types, coverage logic) into the canonical orchestrator+commands stack.

Acceptance criteria:
- All strand.py capabilities now exist in orchestrator+commands
- Existing tests still pass" --label split-child

output: adc-3s1f

args.command:
br create --title "Migrate context modules to canonical stack" --description "Update src/context/warmer.py and src/context/prefetch.py to use src/fetch/commands.py and src/fetch/orchestrator.py instead of src/fetch/executor.py and src/fetch/strand.py.

Acceptance criteria:
- No module imports fetch.strand or fetch.executor
- test_phase3.py passes" --label split-child

output: adc-3g76

args.command:
br create --title "Delete deprecated fetch modules and verify" --description "Delete src/fetch/strand.py and src/fetch/executor.py. Verify with grep that nothing imports them across src/, test/, and root test_*.py files.

Acceptance criteria:
- src/fetch/strand.py deleted
- src/fetch/executor.py deleted
- grep -r 'fetch.strand\|fetch.executor' src/ test/ *.py returns no results" --label split-child

output: adc-55lx

args.command:
br create --title "Update CLAUDE.md and README.md documentation" --description "Update CLAUDE.md and README.md 'Key files' tables to name the same fetch modules (commands.py and orchestrator.py as the canonical implementation).

Acceptance criteria:
- CLAUDE.md and README.md agree on fetch module names
- No references to strand.py or executor.py in either file" --label split-child

output: adc-56ko

args.command: br dep add adc-3s1f adc-1dvh && br dep add adc-3g76 adc-3s1f && br dep add adc-55lx adc-3g76 && br dep add adc-56ko adc-55lx

output:

Added dependency: adc-3g76 depends on adc-3s1f (blocks)
Added dependency: adc-55lx depends on adc-3g76 (blocks)
Added dependency: adc-56ko depends on adc-55lx (blocks)

args.command: br dep add adc-wa9 adc-56ko && br label add adc-wa9 umbrella

args.description: Add umbrella label with ID first

output: Added label 'umbrella' to adc-wa9

args.description: Show parent bead to verify umbrella setup

output:
ID: adc-wa9
Title: Consolidate dual fetch implementations (orchestrator+commands vs strand+executor)
Status: in_progress
Priority: P3
Type: task
Description: There are two parallel fetch-strand stacks:

- Hot path: src/intent/router.py imports src/fetch/commands.py (FetchRequest, FetchContext, command matrix, FetchCoverage) and src/fetch/orchestrator.py (execute_fetch)
- Alternate stack: src/fetch/strand.py (~830 lines, full FetchStrand class with streaming and coverage) plus src/fetch/executor.

args.description: Show last child to verify dependency

output:
ID: adc-56ko
Title: Update CLAUDE.md and README.md documentation
Status: open
Priority: P2
Type: task
Description: Update CLAUDE.md and README.md 'Key files' tables to name the same fetch modules (commands.py and orchestrator.py as the canonical implementation).

Acceptance criteria:
- CLAUDE.md and README.md agree on fetch module names
- No references to strand.py or executor.py in either file
Labels: split-child

args.description: Show dependency tree to verify chain

output:
[adc-56ko] ● Update CLAUDE.md and README.md documentation (P2, blocks)
├── [adc-55lx] ● Delete deprecated fetch modules and verify (P2, blocks)
│   ├── [adc-3g76] ● Migrate context modules to canonical stack (P2, blocks)
│   │   ├── [adc-3s1f] ● Port strand capabilities to canonical stack (P2, blocks)
│   │   │   └── [adc-1dvh] ● Analyze fetch implementation differences (P2, blocks)
